title: Amir Masoud Sefidian - GitHub
text:
GitHub Profile: Amir Masoud Sefidian (iamirmasoud)
Bio: Machine Learning Engineer
Company: Vinted
Location: Berlin
Top Languages: Python, Jupyter Notebook

Top Projects:
- image_captioning (23 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Automatic Image Captioning using PyTorch on MS COCO dataset
- bulkboto3 (19 stars, Python): Python package for fast and parallel transferring a bulk of files to S3 based on boto3!
- facial_keypoint_detection (7 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Facial Keypoint Detection using PyTorch
- pyspark_tutorials (6 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Machine Learning for Big Data using PySpark with real-world projects
- amazon_sentiment (5 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Sentiment Analysis on Amazon Reviews Dataset in PyTorch
- graph_slam (2 stars, Jupyter Notebook): 2D Landmark Detection & Robot Tracking using Offline and Online Graph SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping)
- energy_consumption_prediction (69 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Energy consumption prediction using LSTM/GRU networks in PyTorch
- image_deduplicator (5 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Find and remove duplicated or very similar images from a directory using PyTorch
